metricComparisons.description: raising rotate away from zero should materially reorganize the oscillator frame, not leave the image effectively unchanged
positive rotation should materially bias the rendered stereo field toward the right channel

expectedVideo: raising rotate should turn the oscillator frame cleanly without tearing or blank wedges
the rotated image should stay coherent rather than showing unstable edge shimmer
expectedAudio: positive rotation should move the rendered stereo image toward the right channel
the sweep should preserve signal continuity with no clicks or dropouts
manualChecks: Does the visual turn feel coupled to the stereo-field movement rather than arbitrary?
Does the stronger rotation stay usable instead of sounding lopsided or phase-broken?
